chatbot.title: એગ્રોમિત્રા AI સહાયક
chatbot.placeholder: પાક, હવામાન અથવા બજાર ભાવ વિશે પૂછો...
chatbot.intro: હું તમને આમાં મદદ કરી શકું છું:
chatbot.serverError: ⚠️ સર્વર ભૂલ. કૃપા કરીને થોડા સમય પછી ફરી પ્રયાસ કરો.

home.ctaTitle: તમારા ખેતીના વ્યવસાયને આગલા સ્તર પર લઈ જાઓ
home.ctaSubtitle: એગ્રોમિત્રા સાથે સ્માર્ટ રીતે વેચાણ કરી રહેલા હજારો ખેડૂતોમાં જોડાઓ.

hero.description: ચકાસાયેલ ખરીદદારો અને વિક્રેતાઓ સાથે સીધા જ જોડાઓ. શ્રેષ્ઠ બજાર ભાવ અને સુરક્ષિત વ્યવહારો મેળવો.

features.title: એગ્રોમિત્રા શા માટે પસંદ કરો?
features.f2Desc: UPI અને બેંક ટ્રાન્સફર દ્વારા 100% સુરક્ષિત ચૂકવણી.
features.f3Desc: હવામાન અને પાક વિશે ત્વરિત મદદ મેળવો.

cartPage.title: તમારું કાર્ટ
cartPage.loginRequired: Please login to view your cart.
cartPage.subtitle: Review your selected products before placing order.
cartPage.emptyText: Add products from marketplace to see them here.

checkoutPage.title: ચેકઆઉટ
checkoutPage.subtitle: Review your items and select a delivery address.
checkoutPage.addressRequired: Please add or select a delivery address before continuing.
checkoutPage.stockWarning: Some items exceed available stock. Please update your cart.
checkoutPage.addAddressWarning: Please add a delivery address to continue.

paymentPage.title: ચુકવણી
paymentPage.subtitle: Choose your payment method and confirm your order.
paymentPage.orderIdMissing: Order created but order ID not found in response
paymentPage.desktopHint: Scan the QR code below with your phone's UPI app, or open this page on your mobile to pay directly.
paymentPage.scanApps: Scan with GPay ? PhonePe ? Paytm ? BHIM
paymentPage.demoNotice: After paying via UPI app or QR, click "I Have Paid" below. Real production requires Razorpay / PhonePe / Paytm webhook verification for auto-confirmation.
paymentPage.codNote: Your order will be placed. Payment collected at delivery.

ordersPage.title: મારા ઓર્ડર
ordersPage.noOrders: તમારી પાસે હજી કોઈ ઓર્ડર નથી.

auth.haveAccount: શું તમારી પાસે પહેલેથી જ ખાતું છે? લોગિન કરો

about.title: A smarter digital bridge between farmers and buyers
about.p1: AgroMitra is a modern agricultural marketplace designed to make buying and selling more transparent, efficient, and accessible.
about.p2: We help farmers showcase products directly to buyers while giving customers a clean, premium, and trustworthy shopping experience.
about.point1: Fair pricing with direct marketplace access
about.point2: Modern product discovery and cleaner buying flow
about.point3: Built for real agricultural commerce growth

collective.loadFailed: Collective buying data could not be loaded.
collective.validation: Product, area and quantity are required.
collective.joined: Request joined! Quantity from the same area is now being combined.
collective.title: Collective Buying
collective.subtitle: Buyers from the same area join one product group. Quantity is combined so sellers can offer bulk discounts or deals.
collective.emptyText: Create the first request to start combining buyers.

categoryProducts.title: {{category}} Products
categoryProducts.emptyText: Check back later for new arrivals in {{category}}.

paymentSuccess.subtitle: Your order has been placed. Payment is pending.

paymentSuccess.scan: Scan with GPay, PhonePe, or Paytm

orderConfirmed.title: Payment Successful!
orderConfirmed.subtitle: Your order has been confirmed and is being processed
